item.title: I changed my name!
item.description: So much happened since my first post on this account last april. Everything happened so fast and also not nearly fast enough. I also came out at work yesterday, which means I am now 100% out of the closet. You people kickstarted it all, thank you so much again. Next step hrt! (If I manage to get an appointment at some point...) Completely unrelated but Imagine Dragons released a new (old) song called Monica. Go listen to it, its great!
item.dc:creator: ObviousThrowawayAccountIsObviouslyNot

item.title: Have a lil' break (or don't)
item.description:
Many things suck, right now. We can't bury our heads in the sand about it all, but a short break is not bad for your health ❤ Here are some things.
Only two (2) of them
#isntthisafuturamaepisode
oh no.
It is nearly impossible
Hm. Sounds right.
TAX BENEFITS
"Family sized". HA!
( ♥‿♥)
\m/
Sailor #1: Look! Is land! Write that down! Sailor #2: Writing it down, but with terrible kerning.
123 countries in the world were McDonald's-less, in 2023. They will be the resistance.
The Old English hadn't met Gary, had they
Purgatory probably.
I'm purgatory perhaps probably planning
Good Guy Shark (◠◡◠)
The little bag tied to a stick is called a "bindle"
Like caterpillars to butterflies, I assume the cookies just turn into sewing supplies at some point after having been encased in their tin cocoon
Yaaas queeen of blurry photos
Throwback commercial reference: "I peench"
Because it's so cool. Garlic is the coolest.
Duck yeah
This comes from the guy in the previous picture
It is in the butt. Happiness.
Butt real estate (I bet they're happy)
See? You're worth it ❤
I operate this way.
oh no.
OH NO.
Ah yes, we love the game
...And this game too!
"Cleansing and reapplying the runes anew" will often solve the problem TBH
Damn flashy wizards
They screm ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
Ah yes, there it is.
That's the spirit.
ᶜᵒᶻʸ ˡⁱˡ' ˢⁿᵉᵏ
CUTENESS.
The buggies need them, and we keep messing it up.
"Driver's License Filter"
Illegitimi non carborundum (Mock-Latin for: "don't let the bastards get you down")
Your did it ❤
...-EEEE-EYYYYYYYYE
oh no.
Everyone will be issues a script that they will be required to follow (or be haunted)
Dat good clicky-clacky
I would watch this show very much.
Challenge yourself! Why not 20%! Go for 100%!
Just in case.
HA HA this makes me laugh every time Keep up the good work, crocodiles!
Eff that. Smile and then frown and then smile and then frown - continuously, all day. Make everyone worried or at least mildly terrified.
100% feral (ツ) HAVE A NICE WEEK.

item.title: HELP PLEASE HELP
item.description:
Introduction
Section 1
Section 2
Section 3
Section 4
Section 5
Section 6
Section 7
Section 8
Reminder that gender affirming care for youth is well established and effective: https://juliaserano.medium.com/gender-affirming-care-for-trans-youth-is-neither-new-nor-experimental-a-timeline-and-compilation-b4bb8375d797
WE MUST NOT LET THIS CONTINUE. WE MUST FIGHT FOR OUR RIGHT TO EXIST AND RECEIVE THE MEDICAL CARE WE NEED. Edit: If anyone wants to help me and my spouse specifically, here's a link to my ko-fi, but I don't expect it at this point. I don't even know how I'm going to escape at this point at all. It's basically too late for us. https://ko-fi.com/chaosbuni/goal?g=1 Edit 2: Erin just wrote up a post regarding yesterday's military ban. https://open.substack.com/pub/erininthemorn/p/the-chilling-line-trump-just-crossed?utm_source=share&utm_medium=android&r=2dhxde

item.dc:creator: michaelv2

item.title: Need your good energy to see our Boi thru…
item.description: Our big boi Heroe is getting wheeled into surgery as I post this. He will have his front leg amputated due to cancer (see red outline in 2nd pic). Not having the surgery would’ve meant increased pain, decreased mobility and putting him to sleep as a result. He would’ve suffered…The other risk is that he has tiny clots. He could pass away during surgery. It was a tough decision but after much research and visits with vet specialists it’s the right decision for Heroe. I’m believer in positive vibes and energy…if you have any to spare, please share it with Heroe. UPDATE: first and foremost my daughter, her BF and myself want to thank you from the bottom of our hearts for your positive vibes… it truly made a difference. Heroe is out of surgery as of approximately 2 hours ago. He will be in post op/observation for 48 hrs to monitor the clots. I don’t know how to upload new pics from my iPhone so you could all see how precious Heroe is. He’s covered with my daughter’s bf Tshirt so when he comes to he’ll have a familiar scent to remind him of home. He is in excellent hands. My daughter and her BF have gone above and beyond for Heroe. He is loved. I’m rambling…. Just know that so far, he’s good.

item.title: 22yo Helen Mirren "Herostratus" 1967
item.description:
Helen Mirren, aged 22, in her first credited film role in "Herostratus", a 1967 British experimental psychological drama. Full sequence Youtube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MQh1G8yrfqg or Dailymotion https://www.dailymotion.com/video/x22k628
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Herostratus_(film)

item.title: The Gelmerbahn Funicular. Guttannene, Switzerland

Actual Speed
#the_great_outdoors #mountains #awesome #switzerland #wholesome
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Don't Despair. Just listen to the messages from the sages through the ages: A Joe Strummer Appreciation Post
item.description:
Henry Rollins: "This is punk rock time. This is what Joe Strummer trained you for. It's time to go."
Video for the eponymous/opening track off the album "London Calling." It's a song about the apocalypse, a collapsing social structure due to nuclear war and pollution, economic collapse, climate change, the rise of fascism and white nationalism in England at the end of the 70s/early-80s. You know...things that are unrelated to the times we are living in... [Verse 1] London calling to the faraway towns Now war is declared, and battle come down London calling to the underworld Come outta the cupboard, ya boys and girls London calling, now don't look to us Phony Beatlemania has bitten the dust London calling, see we ain't got no swing Except for the ring of that truncheon thing [Chorus] The ice age is coming, the sun's zoomin' in
The man went beyond music/pop music and was really a spokesman for his generation. When he spoke, people listened. [Chorus, Con't] Meltdown expected, the wheat is growin' thin Engines stop running, but I have no fear 'Cause London is drownin', and I live by the river
The Clash live on the short lived SNL-competition show, Friday’s, 1980.
"Armagiddeon Time," the "London Calling" B-Side A song we can all relate to right now. Every time I hear this, it makes me want to grab a scarf, Muscovy cocktail, my Che Guevera T-shirt (kidding) and hit the streets. A lotta people won't get no supper tonight A lotta people going to suffer tonight 'Cause the battle is getting harder In this Iration, it's Armagideon
Title intro for the documentary Joe Strummer The Future is Unwritten. Not a well-known doc, but it is an amazing film. Just a really amazing look at the man, the music, what he spoke and stood for, and why he's important to history.
Strummer tracking "White Riot" off of The Clash LP (1977)
Me in front of Paul Simonen's bass that graces the cover of London Calling LP. Released: 14 December 1979. This was at the Museum of London a few years back.
The Clash live in Boston, October 1979.
Strummer live
More of Strummer live
And yet even more of Strummer live
L to R: Mick Jones, Joe Strummer, Paul Simonon
The coda version of The Clash
Strummer backstage just being cool as a cucumber.
I believe this was on the tour promoting the Combat Rock LP (1983)
I believe this was from a live film that they did in NYC in 1980-81
Profile of the legend. Handsome devil.
Strummer noodling around on his Teleaster live
L to R: Paul Simonon
Portrait.
Strummer slamming it live
Portrait_3
Such a cool shot. For me, this jump/pose typifies what he did on stage.
Eno tax. EDIT: And a big thank you for the front page confidence. I’ve been doing heavy chemo and radiation of Kate plus a pneumonia hospitalization so that means a lot to me. I bring this up to say that I will try to start better, more Imgur-worthy content. Toodles, my noodles. And remember: there’s more of us than there are of them.
item.dc:creator: NarrowTerbo
